metadata.title: Hide Sidebars on Window Resize
metadata.description: Hide Sidebars on Window Resize Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Increase this to hide the left sidebar sooner; decrease it to delay hiding
ast.target: 增大此值以更快隐藏左侧边栏；减小则延迟隐藏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Increase this to hide the right sidebar sooner; decrease it to delay hiding
ast.target: 增大此值以更快隐藏右侧边栏；减小则延迟隐藏

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide the left sidebar when the window is this narrow
ast.target: 当窗口窄到此宽度时隐藏左侧边栏

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide the right sidebar when the window is this narrow
ast.target: 当窗口窄到此宽度时隐藏右侧边栏

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show sidebars back when window becomes wide again
ast.target: 窗口再次变宽时显示侧边栏

ast.name: text
ast.target: 窗口大小调整时隐藏侧边栏
